title: Warehouse Technician (Equipment Maintenance)
description:
Job Responsibilities

  • Responsible for routine inspection, maintenance, and servicing of all warehouse equipment to ensure proper operation, including but not limited to forklifts, lifts, conveyors, and racking systems.
  • Promptly diagnose equipment faults and carry out necessary repairs or replacement of parts to minimize downtime and ensure smooth warehouse operations.
  • Conduct regular safety checks on warehouse facilities such as fire-fighting equipment, lighting systems, and ventilation systems to ensure compliance with safety standards.
  • Accurately document all maintenance and repair activities, including details, timing, and parts replaced.
  • Manage and maintain spare parts, tools, and maintenance materials required for warehouse repairs.
  • Liaise with, coordinate, and supervise external service providers when outsourced repairs are required.
  • Exercise cost control during maintenance and repair activities by using the maintenance budget responsibly.
  • Propose improvement initiatives for warehouse equipment and facilities maintenance.
  • Strictly comply with company policies and procedures, especially safety operating guidelines.

Requirements

  • Working Hours from 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Monday to Friday)
  • Technical certificate or high school and above; preferably with qualifications in electrical, mechanical, or related disciplines
  • Minimum 1 year of warehouse equipment maintenance experience is preferred.
  • Possession of a Singapore electrical license is required; familiar with the structure, principles, and maintenance methods of common warehouse equipment; basic knowledge of electrical and hydraulic systems.
  • Proficient in using maintenance tools and instruments such as multimeters, wrenches, and welding machines.
  • Good communication and teamwork skills; responsible, diligent, able to work under pressure, and possess strong problem-solving abilities.

postedCompany.description: Big Sailing International (Foodmax) originated from Dingdong Maicai (NYSE: DDL), China's leading fresh food retail platform. Founded in May 2017 and headquartered in Shanghai, China, Foodmax is a fresh food supply chain company focused on delicious food. We provide global customers with food supply chain services including direct sourcing from the source, cross-border customs clearance, product development, warehousing and processing, cold chain logistics, and sales services.
postedCompany.name: BIG SAILING INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.
